title: Team of Rivals: The Political Genius of Abraham Lincoln
author: Doris Kearns Goodwin
description: Doris Kearns Goodwin's Pulitzer Prize-winning portrait of Abraham Lincoln's political genius through the story of his cabinet: the team of rivals he appointed — Seward, Chase, Bates, and Stanton — and how his genius for empathy, timing, and managing egos preserved the Union and ended slavery.
